initial_email_subject: Specialist 3D support for C&G cultural projects
initial_email_body:
Hi Carlos,

I recently explored C&G Partners' work across exhibitions, digital experiences and design for culture, and I wanted to introduce IOM — Interactive Object Media.

IOM is a small creative and technical studio focused on interactive 3D software, Three.js development, optimized real-time environments, architectural visualization, photogrammetry and 360-degree spatial experiences.

Because C&G already leads strategy, content and experience design, I am not proposing an overlapping full-service offer. IOM could work as a specialist production partner when a project needs a virtual reconstruction, browser-based 3D module, optimized model pipeline, interactive architectural environment, 360-degree component or standalone web presentation. I can take responsibility for a clearly defined technical package while working within your team's concept, UX and visual direction.

You can see an overview of my work at https://iobjectm.com/.

I would be glad to share a focused set of relevant examples and learn whether C&G sometimes brings in independent 3D or real-time specialists for project-specific support.

Would you be open to a brief introductory conversation?

Best regards,

Mirjan Čubrić
